title: Freshly Grilled Italian Sirloin Steak Stir-fry
description: A healthy and quick meal that combines the flavors of Italy with fresh sirloin steak in a light stir-fry sauce for a diabetic-friendly breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over high heat. Season the sirloin steak with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in the heated pan until it shimmers.
Add the seasoned sirloin steak to the pan and cook for about 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned but not overcooked. Remove from heat and set aside.
Return the wok to high heat with another tablespoon of oil if necessary. Add sliced bell peppers and diced zucchini into the pan. Stir-fry them for about 2 minutes.
